name: Open Tutor Sample Modules
description: Sample courses included with Open Tutor — Calculus 3 and Building a Load Balancer in Go.

modules.title: Calculus 3
modules.description: Multivariable calculus covering vectors, partial derivatives, multiple integrals, and vector calculus.

modules.title: Building a Load Balancer in Go
modules.description: Build a production-grade round-robin HTTP load balancer from scratch, learning Go's core systems primitives through a single evolving project.
